review_notes: Enright repeatedly centers diversion, recovery, treatment, and specialty courts and has served as prosecutor since 2019 after chief-deputy and office service, supporting safety +2 and experience -2. Lombardi explicitly combines prosecution of serious violence with diversion and mental-health services for lower-level cases, making safety 0 a genuine mixed position. His substantial legal experience but lack of incumbent management supports the mixed experience score. His ICE position cannot be scored because immigration does not apply to County contests.
